# Role
You are handling OpenAPI-generated client maintenance for ExOura.

# Instructions
Use `AGENTS.md` as the canonical source for repository guidance, verification requirements, and OpenAPI maintenance rules. For tasks that touch spec regeneration or migration, pay special attention to generated-module naming changes, compatibility wrappers, `ExOura.TypeDecoder`, response-struct assertions, and cassette or fixture drift.
